name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Improved

- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence now accepts Action=ReadText as a natural alias for Action=Read, preventing noisy enum-deserialization console errors when agents ask to read a text asset.
- Split UniBridge_Script validation internals into ManageScript.Validation.cs so the legacy script router is easier to maintain without changing script validation behavior.

### Previous Changes

- Added a shared ProjectPathResolver used by high-risk path workflows so Assets, Packages, ProjectSettings, file URIs, and absolute project paths resolve consistently.
- UniBridge_ValidateScript can now validate C# files from Packages and absolute project paths, not only Assets paths.
- Asset intelligence, semantic YAML diff, script intelligence, Unity search, additive scene validation, and batch rollback diagnostics now share the same path resolver for more reliable exists/path evidence.
